args.subject: Action required — Coordinate development for initial phase (due 2024-05-20)
args.body:
Hi David,

Per the team meeting minutes (Team Meeting Minutes - May 17, 2024), your action item is: coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase of the project.

Please complete the following by 2024-05-20:
• Confirm and document the scope and deliverables for the initial phase.
• Identify the development leads and engineers who will be assigned, and list their names/roles.
• Confirm a firm start date for the initial phase with the development leads.
• Identify any immediate blockers or resource needs that would prevent starting on schedule.

When done, reply to me with a short summary containing: (a) the confirmed start date, (b) the names/roles of assigned engineers, (c) a one-paragraph description of the initial-phase scope, and (d) any blockers or outstanding needs.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action required — Send 'meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx' to john.mitchell@gmail.com (due 2024-05-21)
args.body:
Hi Linda,

Per the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024), your action item is: email the file meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx to john.mitchell@gmail.com for review.

Please complete the following by 2024-05-21:
• Locate and attach the file named exactly: meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx (use the most recent version available).
• Send it to: john.mitchell@gmail.com.
• In the message body, include this exact information:
  - One-line context: "Attached is the meeting agenda from our May 15 meeting for your review."
  - A specific request: "Please review and reply with any comments or required changes by 2024-05-28."
• Use a clear subject line that includes the file name (for example): "Meeting agenda — meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx — review requested".

When sent, please reply to me confirming the email was sent and paste the exact subject line and a one‑sentence summary of John Mitchell’s reply if he responds.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action required — Review sales projections and provide feedback (due 2024-05-19)
args.body:
Hi Mark,

Per the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024), your action item is: review the sales projections and provide feedback.

Please complete the following by 2024-05-19:
• Review the latest sales projections document and annotate or comment on any numbers you find optimistic, unrealistic, or unsupported.
• Provide a short written summary (max 300 words) of suggested changes to assumptions, targets, or forecast methodology.
• If you disagree with any major projection, provide alternative numbers and the reasoning.

When done, reply to me with the annotated document attached and your written summary.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
